title: Connection recovery does not auto-restore app after server comes back
description: When the server goes down, the app shows a 'Server not reachable' page with a 'Check Connection' button. After the server comes back up, clicking 'Check Connection' shows 'Connecting...' indefinitely and does not return to the main app. A full page reload is required to recover.
expected: Clicking 'Check Connection' when the server is available should detect the connection and transition back to the main app view automatically.
actual: The app gets stuck on 'Connecting...' after clicking 'Check Connection', even when the server is reachable. Only a full page reload recovers the app.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Block network to server (or stop server)
2. Navigate in the app until 'Server not reachable' page appears
3. Unblock network (or start server)
4. Click 'Check Connection'
5. Observe: stuck on 'Connecting...'

title: Graceful server-down page with setup instructions
description: When the API server is unreachable, the app degrades gracefully to a 'Welcome to Claude Tauri' page showing setup instructions and a 'Server not reachable' status with a 'Check Connection' retry button. This provides clear user guidance.
actual: App shows helpful connection setup page with retry option when server is down.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Block network to server
2. Navigate in the app
3. Observe the connection setup page
